title: Frozen judgement
description: Persisted at .pdh-flow/runs/<run>/judgements/<node_id>__round-<n>.json. Wraps a guardian-output with freeze metadata so re-spawn reads the cached decision rather than re-invoking the LLM (idempotency).

guardian_output.description: Verbatim guardian output that was accepted (passed schema + semantic validation). Frozen — never edited after first write.
